scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.includes('pnpm') && !process.env.HOSTINGER && !process.env.CI){console.error('Use pnpm for local installs'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:hostinger: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/ayotrix run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node scripts/copy-frontend-to-api.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
